title: should load the page and render all three sections
verifies: page navigates, root and title are visible, all three section cards (fruit, location, mode) render

title: should update fruit output when selecting different fruits
verifies: fruit dropdown opens/closes, selecting Apple/Banana/Cherry updates output to correct description string

title: should cascade country/city selection and reset city on country change
verifies: city disabled until country selected, filtered city options, city resets on country change, output sentence correct

title: should toggle mode between Basic and Advanced and show/hide advanced panel
verifies: Basic/Advanced toggle buttons switch mode, advanced panel appears/disappears, mode output updates

title: should select priority in advanced panel and update output
verifies: priority dropdown works within advanced panel, selecting High/Medium/Low updates priority output

title: should show combined banner only when fruit=Cherry, priority=High, and mode=Advanced
verifies: three-condition AND logic: banner visible only when all three true, hides when any single condition fails

title: should preserve priority state across mode toggles
verifies: priority ref retains value when panel is v-if removed, re-toggling to Advanced restores full state including banner

title: should exercise all three sections together without cross-contamination
verifies: selections in one section do not affect others, mode toggle preserves fruit/location, no stale state leaks

title: should reset all state when navigating away and back
verifies: keepAlive:false destroys component on nav away, all selections lost, defaults restored on revisit

title: should verify OSelect popovers are teleported and close when option is selected
verifies: popovers are portal-teleported to body, locatable globally, destroyed when closed
